name: Nike Tennis Camp in Lake Tahoe, Granlibakken Resort - Overnight & Day Camp (June 21–26, 2026)
description: Set against the backdrop of Lake Tahoe, the Nike Tennis Camp at Granlibakken Resort offers a focused yet fun training environment for boys and girls ages 9–18. Campers work closely with an experienced coaching staff dedicated to developing strong fundamentals, refining technique, and improving point‑play decision making. name: Nike Tennis Camp at University of Puget Sound - Day Camp (July 27–30, 2026)
description: Overnight Camp Our overnight camp at Puget Sound offers an immersive, on-campus experience where campers reside in the dormitories in adjacent rooms to the camp staff while training during the daytime hours. The tuition includes housing, meals, fun evening activities, as well as college recruiting seminars on Tuesday evening (parents are encouraged to attend the seminars!). Day Camp (9:00am-4:00pm) Nike Tennis Camps also offers a summer day camp program for athletes who do not wish to stay overnight. This program runs 9:00am-4:00pm each day and includes daytime training only. Campers can bring their own lunch or purchase on campus. Nike Sports Camp Experience At University of Puget Sound, Nike Sports Camps offers a unique experience with many sports (Baseball, Cross Country, Soccer, Softball, Swim, Tennis, and Track & Field) operating simultaneously. During the day, the athletes receive sport-specific coaching within their sport focus. In the evening, overnight campers across all sports come together for a special camp-wide experience which includes fun field games, educational seminars, and more. Tennis Facilities/ Transportation The camp utilizes a combination of the University of Puget Sound and Bellarmine Preparatory School tennis complexes. For any off-campus training at Bellarmine Prep (less than two miles from Puget Sound), campers and staff are transported to and from by bus. The 2026 athletic facilities will be confirmed in the spring. The Nike Tennis Camp at University of Puget Sound is open to any and all entrants and limited only by number, age and gender. Athletic facilities and coaches are subject to change. The camp is not owned, sponsored, controlled or endorsed by University of Puget Sound.

name: Nike Tennis Camp (Amherst) at Mount Holyoke College - Tournament Programs - Tournament Training (June 21–26, 2026)
description: Nike Tennis Camp continues its tradition of excellence at the prestigious Mount Holyoke College, a location that has hosted thousands of campers over the years. Directed by Mike Gardner and Ryan Holmes, renowned coaches in the Northeast, this camp offers top-tier training in a world-class environment. This summer, we’re offering two specialized programs designed for advanced and tournament-level players: the Tournament Training Program and the Tournament Challenge Program. The Tournament Training Program is our renowned camp experience tailored for players looking to elevate their competitive game. The Tournament Challenge Program is an intensive 2-week program where you'll train with our expert coaching staff and compete in Official UTR Matches right on the Mount Holyoke College campus. You’ll receive personalized coaching before and after each match to refine your strategy and improve your performance. Both programs offer Overnight, Extended Day, and Full Day options for players ages 8-18, providing flexibility to suit every camper's needs. If your campers is a beginner or intermediate level player, please visit: Nike Tennis Camp at Mount Holyoke - All Skills Program This Camp must comply with the regulations of the Massachusetts Department of Public Health and be licensed by the local Board of Health. Parents/Guardians will have the right to review background checks, healthcare and discipline policies, and grievance procedures upon request.

name: Nike Adult Tennis Camp at Weston Racquet Club - Doubles Tennis & Matchplay Master Course (May 23–24, 2026)
description: Doubles Tactics & Matchplay Master Course Join us for an action packed tennis clinic weekend focused entirely on doubles strategy and performance. Whether you're preparing for league play, want to sharpen your court awareness, or just love the dynamic of doubles, this session is for you. Aimed at players between 2.5-4.0 USTA rating. This program is perfect for players who want to improve their doubles instincts, shot selection, and teamwork—all in a fun, supportive, and challenging environment. Spaces are limited to 16 players, so early sign-up is strongly encouraged! Highlights: Positional drills to master net play, court coverage & communicationTactical instruction for serving strategies, poaching, and returning as a teamLive match play rotations with feedbackServe & volley practice, lob coverage, and middle control drillsGuidance from experienced coach Adam Maddock, bringing a wealth of coaching and competitive insight Adult Beginner Tennis Crash Course Looking to finally learn tennis or get back into the game with confidence? Our Adult Beginner Crash Course is the perfect place to start. Over 6 hours of professional instruction across two sessions, you’ll get hands-on experience and structured guidance in a welcoming, social environment—no pressure, just progress! Whether your goal is to join weekly clinics, play social matches, or just pick up a fun new skill, this crash course is your perfect launchpad. What You'll Learn: Proper grip and stroke fundamentals (forehands, backhands, serves & volleys)Court positioning and movement basicsScoring, rules, and match etiquetteHow to rally and play real pointsFun games and drills to build your confidence and consistency What's Included: Racquets available to borrow (no need to buy one yet!)Drinks and light snacks providedSmall group sizes for individual attentionLed by certified coaches with years of experience

name: Nike Adult Tennis Camp at Pinehurst Resort & Country Club - Day Camp (Nov. 13–15, 2026)
description: Join us at the prestigious Pinehurst Resort & Country Club in North Carolina for Nike Adult Tennis Camps! A three-time U.S. Open host and recognized by Travel + Leisure Golf Magazine as the Best Golf Resort in America, Pinehurst provides a breathtaking setting for your tennis journey. Its world-class tennis facilities have hosted countless local, national, sectional, and professional tournaments, blending rich history with unmatched amenities and stunning scenery. This is your opportunity to elevate your game in one of the premier tennis destinations! Our 3-day camp is open to intermediate, and advanced players ages 18+. The expert coaching staff at Pinehurst are committed to helping players develop essential tennis skills, refine their technique, and improve their point-play strategies.

This premier Southern area camp offers an ideal setting to learn from some of the nation’s top coaches and players. Our junior camp in Auburn features 30 hours of expert tennis instruction, match play, and a camp-wide tournament with awards—perfect for players looking to elevate their game in an inspiring and fun environment! Nike Tennis Camps at Auburn University is solely operated by Jordan Szabo Tennis Camps, LLC which is not affiliated with the Board of Trustees of Auburn University or Auburn University. All camps are open to any and all entrants (limited only by number, age, grade level, and/or gender).

name: Nike Tennis Camp at University of Denver - Day/Overnight Camp (June 29–July 2, 2026)
description: Nike Tennis Camps is thrilled to return to University of Denver in Summer 2026! Register today and enjoy elite-level training while making memories to last a lifetime. The camp offers a unique opportunity to train under the direction of dedicated coaches and current and former collegiate athletes who serve as counselors. The camp is open to athletes ages 10-17. Overnight Camp Our overnight camp at University of Denver offers an immersive, on-campus experience where campers reside in the beautiful DU dormitories in adjacent rooms to the coaching staff while training during the daytime hours. The tuition includes all training, housing, meals, fun evening activities, as well as college recruiting seminars on Tuesday evening (parents are encouraged to attend the seminars). Day Camp (9:00am-4:00pm) Nike Tennis Camps also offers a summer day camp program for athletes who do not wish to stay overnight. This program runs 9:00am-4:00pm each day and includes daytime training only. Campers can bring their own lunch or purchase on campus. Nike Sports Camp Experience At University of Denver, Nike Sports Camps offers a unique experience with many sports (Baseball, Cross Country, Football, Golf, Softball, and Tennis) operating simultaneously. During the day, the athletes receive sport-specific coaching within their sport focus. In the evening, overnight campers across all sports come together for a special camp-wide experience which includes fun field games, educational seminars, and more. Tennis Complex/Transportation Information The camp utilizes a mix of the Englewood High School (3.5 miles away) and Denver South High School (1.5 miles away) tennis facilities off-campus. Campers and staff are transported to and from the tennis complexes for training sessions each day. The Nike Tennis Camp at University of Denver is open to any and all entrants and limited only by number, age and gender. Athletic facilities and coaches are subject to change. The camp is not owned, sponsored, controlled or endorsed by University of Denver.

name: Nike High Performance Tennis Camp at Gordon College & Pingree School -  (June 21–27, 2026)
description: Join us for the Nike High Performance Tennis Camp held on the stunning campus of Pingree School, where intermediate and advanced junior players (with a UTR rating of 2.0 or higher) can push their skills to new heights. This overnight camp offers a focused environment to hone technical details, elevate competitive play, and develop a deeper understanding of the game. Athletes will compete alongside peers of similar levels, train in a supportive team atmosphere, and gain valuable insights to enhance their performance. Above all, participants will experience a fun, competitive environment that fuels both their love for tennis and their continued progress. Tennis instruction will take place at Pingree School for all campers. Overnight campers will reside nearby at Gordon College's dormitory.

name: Nike Tennis Camp at Cal Poly San Luis Obispo -  (July 20–23, 2026)
description: Nike Tennis Camps is excited to return to Cal Poly San Luis Obispo in 2026! Register today and enjoy elite-level training while making memories to last a lifetime. The camp offers a unique opportunity to train under the direction of passionate coaches and current and former collegiate athletes who serve as counselors. The camp is open to athletes ages 10-17. Overnight Camp Our overnight camp at Cal Poly offers an immersive, on-campus experience where campers reside in the dormitories in adjacent rooms to the camp staff while training during the daytime hours. The tuition includes all training, housing, meals, fun evening activities, as well as college recruiting seminars on Tuesday evening (parents are encouraged to attend the seminars!). Day Camp (9:00am – 4:00pm) Nike Tennis Camps also offers a summer day camp program for athletes who do not wish to stay overnight. This program runs 9:00am-4:00pm each day and includes daytime training only. Campers can bring their own lunch or purchase on campus. Nike Sports Camp Experience At Cal Poly San Luis Obispo, Nike Sports Camps offers a unique experience with many sports (Cross Country, Football, Softball, Soccer, Swim, Tennis, and Track & Field) operating simultaneously. During the day, the athletes receive sport-specific coaching within their sport focus. In the evening, overnight campers across all sports come together for a special camp-wide experience which includes fun field games, educational seminars, and more. The Nike Tennis Camp at Cal Poly SLO is open to any and all entrants and limited only by number, age and gender. Athletic facilities and coaches are subject to change. The camp is not owned, sponsored, controlled or endorsed by Cal Poly SLO.

With expert coaching focused on improving technique, strategy, and match play, this camp provides a well-rounded training experience for adults looking to enhance their game. Campers will receive personalized instruction, enjoy the beautiful surroundings, and have the opportunity to connect with other players in a relaxed resort setting. Whether you're focused on skill development or simply enjoying time on the court, this camp offers a great way to spend a weekend in Lake Tahoe. Participants hoping to stay at Granlibakken Resort can reserve rooms at a discounted rate using either the link or promo code below! Link: Granlibakken Resort Booking Link Promo Code: NKECMP CLICK HERE TO VIEW ALL NIKE CAMPS AT GRANLIBAKKEN RESORT, LAKE TAHOE

name: Nike Adult Tennis Camp at University of Hawaii, Manoa -  (May 12, 2026)
description: Join us at the Adult Tennis Camp at the University of Hawai‘i at Mānoa, led by Head Coach Jun Hernandez! Adult campers receive top-tier technical instruction, focused drilling, and supervised match play from an experienced and passionate coaching staff. Designed for players of all levels, this camp strikes the perfect balance between serious skill development and fun on the court. Whether you're looking to fine-tune your strokes, boost your match strategy, or just enjoy playing in a beautiful, energetic environment, this camp has something for everyone. Come join us for an unforgettable tennis experience—sharpen your game, connect with fellow players, and enjoy the aloha spirit in every swing! JR TENNIS CAMP AT UNIVERSITY OF HAWAII, MANOA We're excited to also bring you the Junior Tennis Camp at the University of Hawaii at Manoa! Click the link for details. *If you are a returning camper, feel free to sign up via phone at (800) 645-3226 for a much quicker enrollment process*

name: Nike Tennis Camp at UC Santa Barbara -  (July 6–9, 2026)
description: Nike Tennis Camps is thrilled to offer camps at beautiful UC Santa Barbara this summer. This camp provides a unique opportunity to train under the direction of amazing coaches while making memories to last a lifetime. This coed camp is open to beginner, intermediate and advanced players ages 10-17. Overnight Camp Register for our Overnight Camp at UCSB and enjoy an immersive collegiate tennis experience. Campers reside in the oceanfront Manzanita Village Residence Hall in adjacent rooms to the camp staff while training with current and former college coaches and athletes. The tuition includes housing, meals, fun evening activities, as well as college recruiting and sports psychology seminars (parents are encouraged to attend the seminars!). This program is open to players of all ability levels, and groups are separated by age and ability level on the first day. Day Camp Nike Tennis Camps also offers a summer Day Camp program for local players who would like to commute to camp each day. This program runs 9:00am-4:00pm (schedule varies by day) and includes daytime training only. Campers must bring their own lunch or purchase on campus. This program is open to players of all ability levels, and groups are separated by age and ability level on the first day. The Nike Tennis Camp at UCSB is open to any and all entrants and limited only by number, age and gender. The Nike Tennis Camp at UCSB is not owned, sponsored, co-sponsored or controlled by the University.

name: Nike Pickleball & Tennis Camp at Hyatt Regency Monterey Hotel and Spa -  (June 8–12, 2026)
description: This summer, we are excited to introduce a brand new junior camp experience that brings together both tennis and pickleball in one unforgettable week. Located in the beautiful coastal setting of Monterey, this camp is designed for players ages 8 to 14 who are new to the game or already building their skills and looking to improve while having fun. Campers will train in both sports each day, learning fundamentals, improving technique, and building confidence through games, drills, and match play. Our coaching staff creates a positive and energetic environment where players can learn, compete, and make friends while enjoying one of the most scenic camp locations in California.This is a unique opportunity for young athletes to experience two of the fastest growing racquet sports in one exciting camp setting. If your camper cannot attend the whole week of camp, please contact us at 1-800-645-3226 (M-F 8am-5pm PST) for a pro-rated discount.

name: Cal Tennis Camp at UC Berkeley -  (June 1–5, 2026)

With a dynamic mix of match play, drill work, and strategy sessions, it’s one of the top tennis camps in California! Directed by Cal Berkeley Tennis Coaches, including Kris Kwinta, our junior tennis camp provides expert instruction and a supportive environment to help you elevate your game. Don’t miss out—join the fun and improve your skills this summer! All Cal Sports Camps are open to any and all entrants. For your safety and benefit, we recommend you choose a camp that fits your level of development. All events are subject to change based on NCAA restrictions. name: Nike Tennis Camp at Westchester Tennis Center - Recreational Camp (June 29–July 3, 2026)
description: Welcome to the Nike Tennis Camp at Westchester Tennis Center in Port Chester, NY! Led by Sasha Bluestone, your camper will engage in learning the sport of tennis while refining their skills and point play abilities. We prioritize individual skill development and the importance of sportsmanship and teamwork while fostering a positive competitive atmosphere. Our morning Recreational Camp session welcomes juniors of any and all skill levels, ages 6-14 years old. This camp will utilize red, orange, green, and yellow balls. Skilled Tournament players, 8-17, are invited to our afternoon Performance Camp session. Yellow Ball players must have a UTR rating of 3 or higher. Both sessions are designed for players to improve their tennis game, work hard, and play harder!

name: Nike Adult Tennis Camp at Johns Hopkins University -  (July 18–19, 2026)
description: The Adult Tennis Camp at Johns Hopkins University is designed to help players sharpen their overall game in a competitive, high-energy environment. Participants will improve stroke consistency, serve reliability, net play, footwork, and court positioning while developing smarter singles and doubles strategy. Through structured drilling and guided point play, players will build better shot selection, tactical awareness, and confidence in pressure situations. Campers will also gain valuable match experience through supervised singles and doubles play, including select points recorded and shared for individual review. This added video feedback allows players to see positioning, patterns, and decision-making in real time - helping accelerate improvement even after camp ends. The overall focus is improved performance, stronger competitive instincts, and greater confidence on court

description: Welcome to the Nike Tennis Camp at Bowie State University! Our camp is designed for enthusiastic juniors eager to take their game to the next level through personalized coaching in a supportive and encouraging environment. Our coaching philosophy focuses on cultivating a love for the sport, boosting confidence, and refining technical skills through progressive development. Campers will receive expert tennis instruction from two current collegiate coaches: Todd Byrom, Head Women’s Tennis Coach at Bowie State University, and Zach Tobias, Associate Head Coach for Men’s and Women’s Tennis at Howard University. This junior tennis camp is tailored for beginner and intermediate-level boys and girls, ages 6-17. Campers will improve their tennis skills, work hard, make lasting friendships, and, most importantly, have fun in a dynamic and engaging setting!

name: Nike Tennis Camp at Alabama A&M University -  (June 15–19, 2026)
description: Join the Nike Tennis Camp at Alabama A&M University for an exciting and skill-building experience designed for beginner and intermediate players ages 8–17! Hosted on a beautiful collegiate campus, this camp provides a fun, supportive environment where young athletes develop fundamentals, improve technique, and build confidence on the court. Led by experienced coaches, players receive personalized instruction in stroke development, footwork, match strategy, and sportsmanship through engaging drills and match play. Campers can choose between a full-day option for comprehensive training and competitive play, or a half-day option for focused skill development with flexibility for summer schedules. Whether your child is just starting out or looking to elevate their game, this Nike Tennis Camp delivers high-energy instruction, skill progression, and plenty of fun.
